overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a cloaked character walking along a misty coastal cliffside path during golden hour, transitioning through a rustic village with thatched huts and stone structures before returning to the open cliff edge where a bird flies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with wooden posts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow cliffside path with the ocean to the right

entered.detail: tall wooden post marking the cliff edge path
rocky cliff face rising on the left side of the path
calm sea extending to the horizon with mist near the surface
narrow dirt trail along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging the cliff edge, with a steep rock wall on the left and the misty ocean extending to the right. Wooden posts line the path as the sun casts long shadows across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside with sea stacks visible

events.description: rocky sea stacks become visible through the mist in the water

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliff path as the sun glare intensifies over the water

entered.detail: tall rocky outcrops rising from the misty ocean water

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the cliff edge with the sun creating bright glare on the water. Rocky sea stacks emerge from the mist in the distance while the cliff wall recedes slightly to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal village with thatched huts and scarecrows

events.description: path transitions from rocky cliff to grassy village area with thatched structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the village area, passing wooden scarecrows and approaching a thatched hut

entered.detail: round hut with conical straw roof and stone walls
wooden scarecrow with outstretched arms beside the path
simple fence made of wooden posts and rope
weathered wooden planks forming the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a rustic coastal village with grass underfoot. The character passes wooden scarecrows and rope fences while approaching a traditional thatched-roof hut, moving away from the immediate cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge with stone tower overlooking the ocean

events.description: bird flies overhead across the sky

agents.ego_description: walking past a round stone tower and returning to the cliff edge overlooking the ocean

notable_agents.action: bird flying high overhead across the sky

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower with wooden upper structure
stacked stone foundation of the tower
calm sea visible again beyond the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character rounds a stone tower and emerges back onto the open cliff edge with expansive ocean views. A bird flies overhead as the sun illuminates the misty water below, with grassy terrain underfoot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a misty coastal cliffside that transitions through a rustic village before returning to an expansive ocean overlook. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt trail between a steep rock wall and the misty sea, where wooden posts line the path under the long shadows of the setting sun. As the camera advances, the cliff wall recedes and the sun creates a bright glare over the water, revealing rocky sea stacks emerging from the distant haze. The scene then shifts away from the edge into a coastal village, moving across grassy terrain past wooden scarecrows and rope fences toward a traditional thatched-roof hut. Finally, the camera rounds a stone tower to emerge back onto the open cliff edge, where a bird flies overhead against a backdrop of sun-illuminated misty waters.
